udt_union_v0.doc:
DeFindex Fee Drain Exploit \xe2\x80\x94 Atomic Contract

Performs the entire exploit in a SINGLE transaction:
1. Deposit USDC into DeFindex vault \xe2\x86\x92 receive vault shares
2. Deposit USDC into Blend pool \xe2\x86\x92 spikes strategy.balance()
3. Call vault.report() (NO AUTH) \xe2\x86\x92 records fake gains
4. Withdraw ALL vault shares \xe2\x86\x92 get inflated amount
5. Withdraw from Blend pool \xe2\x86\x92 recover spike deposit

Net result: more USDC out than in. Difference = other depositors' funds.
